programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Based on the award-winning novel, starring Viggo Mortensen and Charlize Theron. A father and young son traverse the deadly post-apocalyptic landscape that was once America (2009).
The Baron is tricked into looking over a deal between the King of Ammak and a millionaire to buy some of the Ammak crown jewels.

programmes.show_name: Disaster Zone: Volcano In New York
programmes.show_description: Fiery drama with Michael Ironside. Things heat up when an underground experiment blows the lid off Manhattan - literally. With lava in the streets, a construction crew must plug the meltdown. (2006)
A nine-month-old toddler is treated by the crew after pulling a bucket of boiling water onto himself, and a runaway vehicle with children onboard is seen heading towards a ravine.
Fears grow that a teenage girl has sustained a spinal injury, a clifftop stroll has a frightening outcome for a tourist, and rescue crews try to reach a trapped motorcyclist.
A skydiver's parachute fails to open, an adrenaline seeking ten-year-old is tossed from his motorbike, and as the flood waters rise, an ugly bar room brawl claims a victim.

Disaster film starring Sebastian Spence. When a deadly jet stream vortex unleashes tornadoes over Manhattan, a race begins to stop the storm before the city is torn apart. (2008)
